diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,160 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and initializes routing with SmartRouter as default.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegexRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema.
+- Simple note: Class constructor accepts router option or uses SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base module providing core Hono functionality including method handlers, routing, middleware support, error/notFound handling.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, compose, Context, Router, METHODS, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler, getPath, mergePath, basePath, route, onRequest, fetch, request.
+- Simple note: Implements get/post/put/delete/patch/all/on/use methods with private router field and #dispatch for request handling.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index file that exports PatternRouter class.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export statement re-exports router implementation.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using RegExp-based route matching with support for named parameters.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, PARAM, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, emptyParams.
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to RegExp during add() and matches against all routes on each request.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index file that exports LinearRouter class.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export statement re-exports router implementation.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter using sequential linear search through route array.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTE_LOOP, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices.
+- Simple note: Linear scan of routes with support for wildcards and named parameters, returns early on first match.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index file for RegExpRouter with PreparedRegExpRouter export for serialization.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, buildInitParams.
+- Simple note: Exports main router and prepared router variant for Wasm/edge deployment.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter using Trie structure that builds compiled regex matcher after all routes registered.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, ParamIndexMap, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, match, Trie, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, findMiddleware.
+- Simple note: Two-phase design: routes added first then buildAllMatchers() creates final regex pattern with static maps for fast lookup.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Defines matcher type and match function for RegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, emptyParam, match.
+- Simple note: match() function builds matchers lazily and handles static map lookup or RegExp matching with param stash.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for pre-built matcher initialization with serialization support.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, MatcherMap, Matcher, StaticMap, HandlerData, METHOD_NAME_ALL, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Constructor takes pre-built matchers and relocateMap allowing routes to be registered after initialization.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class for Trie structure used by RegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR.
+- Simple note: Insert path tokens into trie and buildRegExpStr() constructs grouped regex patterns.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie class that preprocesses paths before delegating to Node structure.
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, ParamAssocArray, Node, ReplacementMap, ParamIndexMap.
+- Simple note: Handles pattern extraction and delegates to Node.insert() for trie building, then buildRegExp() creates final pattern.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index file that exports SmartRouter class.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export statement re-exports router implementation.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter that tries multiple routers in sequence until one succeeds.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter.
+- Simple note: Iterates through registered routers adding routes to each until match succeeds, then caches winning router.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index file that exports TrieRouter class.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export statement re-exports router implementation.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using tree-based structure for efficient prefix matching.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, Params, Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter.
+- Simple note: Insert paths into node tree with method/handler storage, search traverses for exact matches first then wildcards.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class for TrieRouter tree structure with pattern support.
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern.
+- Simple note: Maintains multiple method handlers per node, search() traverses path with regex matching for named parameters.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities for router family tests covering common routing scenarios.
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, Params, Router, ParamIndexMap, match, Basic Usage, Reserved words, Complex, Registration order, Multi match, Duplicate param name.
+- Simple note: Parameterized test runner that skips tests based on router capabilities, common cases include named params, wildcards, optional params, middleware chains.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter including common cases and router-specific scenarios.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash.
+- Simple note: Skips some common tests due to UnsupportedPathError on duplicate params, handles trailing slash normalization.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter including common cases and router-specific scenarios.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Multi match, Trailing slash, Skip part.
+- Simple note: Skips multi-match with :id/*/action pattern due to UnsupportedPathError, validates linear search correctness.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter including common cases and router-specific limitations.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Return value type, Ambiguous, Multiple handlers with different label.
+- Simple note: Throws UnsupportedPathError on ambiguous routes like :id and :user with same path prefix, validates regex matcher output format.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Uses RegExpRouter first then TrieRouter fallback, inherits all common test cases.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter including common cases.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Full test coverage including all common cases without skips.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Node class including tree traversal, pattern matching, and multi-match scenarios.
+- Names noticed: Node, search, insert, Basic Usage, Name path, Named params and a wildcard, Wildcard, Regexp, Multi match, Sort Order, fallback, star, Routing order.
+- Simple note: Comprehensive tree-based routing tests including duplicate param handling with overwrites per search() call.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+## Artifact Summary
+
+- File created: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
+- Total files documented: 25
+- Routes analyzed: PatternRouter, LinearRouter, RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter
+- Test coverage: Common cases shared across all routers plus router-specific edge cases
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

This is a detailed task asking me to create a routing read/write ledger document by reading multiple files from a Hono repository. Let me break down what I need to do:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the specified files
3. Create a markdown file with specific format for each file
4. Add a cross-file checklist section

This is a mechanical documentation task, not a debugging task. Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the files in parallel where possi
